name: @nshiab/simple-data-analysis
description: Easy-to-use and high-performance TypeScript library for data analysis. Works with tabular, geospatial and vector data.

tasks.all-tests: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check src/index.ts && deno publish --allow-dirty --dry-run && rm -rf test/output && deno test -A --env-file --fail-fast && deno task llm
tasks.llm: deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/deno-docs-to-md --jsr=@nshiab/simple-data-analysis-core && deno fmt llm.md
tasks.patch: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version patch
tasks.minor: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version minor
tasks.major: deno task all-tests && deno run -A jsr:@nshiab/bump-version major
